race.comment: SALUDAR (5) resumes having shown some promise in two runs to date, going to the paddock after finding one better over 1300m at this track. Fancy he'll have improved for the Begg yard this time around with an impressive jumpout and take beating. FRENCH ACCORD (8) has just found one better in both starts to date, beaten the barest of margins at Geelong last time out in an encouraging effort. She can continue to improve and will be hard to hold out. CHAMPAGNE ANYONE (6) is a filly by Written Tycoon on debut for the Begg yard who has jumped out fairly. Watch the market for the top stable. LUSCOMBE (9) is a nicely bred Blue Point filly on debut for the Maher yard who should be ready to go.
